dialog.stepLabel: (剧情、站桩、传送)尝试解除岛4的风暴
dialog.nodeDesc: (剧情、站桩、传送)尝试解除岛4的风暴

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: You see, Captain. What did I tell you?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: It says here, "Riccioli, shower Neptunia with your light. The usurper slumbers in the depths of Reyes. Offer your love to Reyes' descendants and the eternal life of the sea."

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: What's all this nonsense?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Riccioli corresponds to Neptunia in Rinascitan astrology. In other words, the island is surrounded by the deepest waters in all of Rinascita.

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: Ho, ho. You know your astrology well, Miss White Hat.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: I'm just stating what everyone in Rinascita knows. It's also mentioned in the legends of the Sentinel Imperator.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: I... I'm not sure.

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: "Offer your love..."

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: So it's asking us to fall in love with somethin'? That's just plain odd!

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: Bleh.

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: O great, noble descendants of Reyes, hear my words! I offer ye me love!

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: Umm... I shall offer ye my love! The ceaseless waves shall be my pledge of loyalty to you for all eternity!

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: Bah, I'm gettin' too old for this! What dunderheaded idea is this, anyway!

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: Go on, {Male=laddie;Female=missy}. You give it a go!

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: Aye, you. Just a few words, for the love of the sea! What, need a pen and paper, do ye?

options.text: O great, noble descendants of Reyes...

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: No, no, no! You're all doing it wrong!

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: What do you take love for? Is this a joke to you?

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: Step aside!

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: My love. You are the light of my life.

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: No storm can keep us apart, for in your presence, the might of my love can withstand any tempest, for it is even stronger!

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: My soul yearns to break free, for it has found its direction, yet I am tormented by my inability to reach you...

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: It's working! It's working!

items.speaker: Starbuck
items.text: Oh, my dearest love—

items.speaker: Ahab
items.text: That's enough of that! Let's move out! We've got no time to dawdle!

dialog.stepLabel: (剧情、C级和布兰特告别（加载02，卸载01）
dialog.nodeDesc: (剧情、C级和布兰特告别（加载02，卸载01）

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: It appears that Pequod wasn't able to escape its fate after all...

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Alas, my duty as acting captain has been fulfilled. Farewell, my friends!

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: The Tidebreaker...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Oh, hey, big guy! Nice to see you again!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: I still remember when you flipped over our boat last time, you know. But considering you just saved us, I'll call it even! Hmph... Like the old Jinzhou saying, something like "Big folks let little things slide!"

options.text: It's obviously way bigger than you are.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: The big guy says that "siren" helped care for its wounds, but then she went cuckoo after sucking in too many Reverberations.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: That's why it didn't want to fight her earlier. After teaching her a lesson, maybe she'll know better.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Tidebreaker. I... I have something to ask you!

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Have you fully recovered?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Of course it is! Look at it live and kicking. It's never been better.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: You were tricked and deceived during the Carnevale... I know that an Acolyte like me is in no position to represent the Order...

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: But I still wish to offer you an apology, Cetus the Tidebreaker, even if it's only my own.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: It says don't beat yourself up over it.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: You've been following its trail all this time, helping fishermen and receiving gifts of the sea yourself. It's trying to protect that stuff, too.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Oh! It also wants me to tell you great job on catching that big fish earlier!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: "Just be yourself, whether it's giving or receiving, belief or hope," it says.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: I see. Thank you for telling me that!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Sure we are! Nothing stands in our way when we tag team!

options.text: What if one day I manage...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Uhh, what's up, big fella? Cat got your tongue?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Are they... laughing?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Whoa!!!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: W-W-Where do you think you're goin'? Oh, I'm so catching that whale someday. Just you wait and see!
